_meta.purpose: Controlled vocabulary for the knowledge graph: the closed set of node and edge types, their id prefixes, and the allowed source->target node types per edge. Read by scripts/graph/validate-graph.js for typed-edge endpoint validation and usable as the graph contract by consumers/agents.
_meta.do_not_edit: Hand-authored. Keep in sync with scripts/lib/graph/model.js PREFIX and the edge emitters in scripts/graph/derive-graph.js.

component.description: A UI component from a registry (DS Kit / FM Kit / Meta Kit).

foundation_section.description: A design-foundation section (tokens, color, spacing, ...); hierarchical.

app.description: An Actian product application (Studio, Explorer, Administration).

app_entity.description: A product/domain entity from the app-context model (Data Product, Dataset, Access Request, ...).

terminology_term.description: A controlled-terminology term: preferred usage + meaning + discouraged alternatives.

ux_pattern.description: A product UX pattern (marketplace browsing, import wizard, ...).

a11y_ref.description: Transversal reference to an accessibility criterion; scope=category (inherited) or component (specific).

foundations_ref.description: Transversal reference to a design foundation.

motion_ref.description: Transversal reference to a motion pattern.

related.description: Non-hierarchical association from a content topic to a component.

narrower.description: SKOS-style broader/narrower hierarchy (non-transitive; topical, NOT subclass or part-of). Was 'child' before this version.

in_app.description: A domain entity or UX pattern appears in / belongs to an app.

entity_related.description: A directed relationship between two domain entities; the specific relation name rides the edge's 'predicate' field (36 distinct predicates share this one type).

term_about.description: A terminology term is about an entity/app/pattern, inferred where the term key exactly matches the node slug (confidence=inferred).
